_field_doc.enabled: Whether helped-based positive reinforcement is active.
_field_doc.min_fired: Minimum fired count before a directive can be reinforced.
_field_doc.min_helped: Minimum helped count before a directive can be reinforced.
_field_doc.min_helped_ratio: helped / (helped + not_helped) must be at least this value.
_field_doc.max_rejected_rate: rejected / fired must be no more than this value.
_field_doc.cooldown_hours: Minimum hours between automatic priority boosts for one directive.
_field_doc.max_priority: Upper cap for automatic positive reinforcement; keep below priority>=10 red lines.
